title: neoalsomitra integrifoliola
intro: Neoalsomitra integrifoliola is a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae, commonly known as the cucumber family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Neoalsomitra integrifoliola include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or mixing them with other herbs to create a medicinal remedy.
